_comment: Per-biome harvestables + decor. placement_mode: forest_patch|vein|field|pocket|scatter. min_biome_tier gates high loot. Categories: trees/rocks/ore/formations/crystals.

decor._comment: Every biome: large blocking props + small flora/bones/rocks. passable=true = walkable ground cover (flowers, bone scatter).

floor_pickup_density._comment: Per-cell chance that a stick or stone appears on a walkable ground cell.
